title: jurinea pulchella
intro: Jurinea pulchella, also known as the delicate wormwood or yellow chamomile, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. Traditionally, Jurinea pulchella has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's extracts have been shown to exhibit health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting off bacterial infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Jurinea pulchella can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and menstrual cramps.
